HathiTrust Public Finance Coverage

A searchable catalogue of digitised US state and territorial public finance records available through the HathiTrust Digital Library. Records span auditor, treasurer, tax commission, legislative journals, and related reports.

6,297 records
53 states & territories
1792 – 1952 years covered
State ↕ Year ↕ Document Type ↕ Biennial ↕ HathiTrust

Records sourced from HathiTrust Digital Library. Coverage: 1792–1952  ·  US state & territorial public finance documents.
